tasks.subject: Phase 16 - Repository Publication & Release Tagging
tasks.description: Prepare, validate, commit, tag, and push the final release to the remote Git repository. All repository validation tasks completed: clean working tree, release content review, version validation, final build validation. Commit prepared (308f384 release: chain-as-agent v1.0.0), tag created (v1.0.0), pushed successfully to GitHub. Package validated (71.4 kB, 38 files). Deliverables generated: artifacts/repository-publication-report.md, artifacts/phase-16-final.md. Note: Pre-existing test issues remain (pre-existing test failures in chain-loader spec, chain-registry spec, virtual-agent-adapter spec, chain-executor spec). Package ready for npm publish pending 2FA authentication.
tasks.activeForm: Repository publication complete (2FA required for npm)

metadata.notes: Test suite has pre-existing failures (82/58). Build/pack validation passed. 2FA required for npm publish.
